entries.title: About the Course
entries.content: Students focus on US geography using maps, illustrations, and historical narratives about travelers during the 19th century.

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content: This course is different for each of the historical time periods, but always retains a topical focus on US geography.

rows.label: Geography: Grade 8 (U.S.)
rows.books: Our States Have Crazy Shapes, United States Atlas 7th Ed., Student World Atlas 6th Ed., Westward with Fremont: The Story of Solomon Carvalho, This Strange Wilderness: The Life and Art of John James Audubon
